name: VR Travel - City of London Bus Tour

reviews.review_description:
Yes this is apparently possible. As if you're on the deck of this double-decker NRM. Very nice experiance in combination with other London VR tours in this bundle (river cruise, walking like a tourist &c.).
One nice-to-have feature could be to be able to pause the tour to have a look around on the spot

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great feedback — that’s exactly the feeling we wanted to create: sitting up top, drifting through London, fully in the moment.

Your idea to add a pause feature is much appreciated.
Right now, we’ve chosen a continuous flow to preserve immersion, but we’re exploring ways to offer more flexibility in future versions.

reviews.review_description: I was excited to relive my time that I spent in London but this is not a well made app.   The quality of what you see is very poor and for some reason it kept pausing.  The price would have been great had it been done well.  I saw a video about how it shows it looks but it didn't have that quality on my Quest 3. Misleading video.  I am very disappointed.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry the experience didn’t feel right on your Quest 3.
Since then, we’ve improved streaming quality specifically for Quest users.

This experience is part of VRtravelX’s slow, immersive 360° journeys:
You’re on the top deck, riding through real London — no controls, no pressure, just watching, listening, and being there.
A quiet mental break from daily life — intentionally slow, intentionally real.

Feel free to explore our other VRtravelX experiences — each journey is different, but always real.
